items: Resumed scheduled email guardrail work after confirming `memory/email-actions-paused.json` had `paused: false`.
Read and enforced `config/email_guardrail_policy.json` as the source of truth for allowlist / Lyra invariants.
Ran mailbox-pinned Gmail inbox scan through `scripts/gmail-safe.sh` so all checks stayed on `cheese@luggle.com`.
Updated durable state in `memory/email-state.json` with the latest guardrail run metadata (`lastGuardrailCheckAt`, pinned account, policy version, scan counts).
Completed a guardrail sweep over 174 inbox messages.
Found 0 new non-allowlist alerts requiring escalation.
Identified pending allowlist items still needing action, including Ron threads and multiple unreplied Lyra messages preserved by durable state.
Suppressed routine/no-noise output after the guardrail run because nothing required immediate intervention.
